name: Pesto Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry vermouth or dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients except the pine nuts in the bread machine, program for Raisin Bread, and press start.
2. When the beeper sounds, add the pine nuts. Pesto is a pungent Italian sauce made from ground-up basil, pine nuts, and Parmesan cheese. It was traditionally available only in the summer when fresh basil is plentiful. Now you can buy it in most grocery stores bottled, in the refrigerator case, or even in a tube. Homemade may be best, but store-bought is just fine.
From "Bread Machine Baking" by Lora Brodi & Millie Apter
Recipe By: Martha Sheppard
